Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Continued To May-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Paul Gruwell, via ZOOM, for Sal Balistreri, Respondent; Kevin O'Brien, via ZOOM, for Mary Balistreri, Petitioner.

The court queries counsel regarding the appeal. Mr. O'Brien reports receiving the appeal decision on Feb-24-2022 and was forwarded to his client who is considering her options and notes the appeal related deadlines and requests a continuance of sixty (60) days accordingly. Mr. Gruwell does not object to Mr. O'Brien's request.

All matters on today's calendar are continued to May-16-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Timothy Barton, via ZOOM, for Sal Balistreri, Objector; Kevin O'Brien, via ZOOM, for Mary Balistreri, Petitioner.

The requests a status of mediation. Mr. O'Brien reports that the appeal has been stayed and that it may take some time for the mediation to occur, accordingly. Mr. Barton suggests a sixty or ninety day continuance to which Mr. O' Brien agrees.

The Petitions and Status of Mediation are continued to Jan-31-2022 at 9:00 am in Department 204. A Status of the Appeal is set for the same date.

Petition For Order Reforming Or Modifying Trust And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-19-2021 Continued To Sep-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Franceschini, Esq., for and with Sal Balistreri, beneficiary, respondent (appearing separately by video conference); Ryan Szczepanik, Esq., counsel for Mary Balistreri, Petitioner (appearing by video conference); Marc Balistreri, interested person (appearing by video conference).

Court and counsel discuss the status of the case. After query by the Court and some discussion, counsel agree to mediation. Upon further inquiry by the Court, Mr. Franceschini advises the Court that his client will pursue private mediation.

The Court continues the matter and sets hearing for status of the mediation for September 13, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

Petition For Order Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Apr-19-2021 Continued To Sep-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Determining Validity Of Trust Amendment
Off Calendar Feb-03-2021 Continued To Apr-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions And To Construe Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Feb-09-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Richard Franceschini appeared by zoom for and with Sal Balistreri by zoom.
Ryan Szczepanik appeared by zoom for Mary Nivala Balistreri (Trustee).

The Court noted that the order that was issued on January 8, 2021 adjudicated one petition, but not the other and that the order did not specifically rule on Mr. Balistreri's cross-petition to determine the validity of the trust amendment. The Court also stated that in light of the Court's determination that the trust amendment is invalid, Mr. Szczepanik's Client's petition for instructions on the interpretation of the term "stock trust" used in the amendment is now moot, and that it intends to deny Mary's petition and grant Sal's petition. Mr. Szczepanik stated that he filed a new petition, asked the Court to continue both petitions to April 19th, stated that the claims have to do with the issue of interpretation of some of the documents, raised the issue of his Client being entitled to an evidentiary hearing and raised concern about there being an affirmative ruling on Mr. Franceschini's petition when it makes allegations that have not been tried. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to whether or not the petition should be deemed as moot or kept alive. At the conclusion of argument, the Petition for Instructions is under submission and the Petition for Order Determining Validity of Trust Amendment is continued to April 19, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions And To Construe Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Jan-08-2021 Continued To Feb-03-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances by Zoom:
Richard T. Franceschini, Esq. for Sal J. Balistreri, Objector.
Ryan Szcezepanik, Esq appearing by Zoom for Mary Nivala Balistreri.
Marc Balistreri appearing by Zoom in pro per.

At the conclusion of counsel's argument, the Court stated that it finds that the first amendment is invalid due to the requirement of a notary. The Court directs Mr. Franceschini to prepare a form of order. Mr. Francheschini informed the Court that a proposed order was submitted.

The Court continued the matters to February 3, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Frank . Matter not reported.

Petition For Instructions And To Construe Trust Instrument
Off Calendar Dec-23-2020 Continued To Jan-08-21 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Richard Franceschini, Esq., counsel for and with Sal Balistreri, former Trustee (appearing separately by video conference); Ryan Szczepanik, Esq., counsel for Mary Balistreri, Trustee (appearing by video conference); Marc Balistreri, interested person (appearing by video conference).

The Court notes review of the extensive briefing on the issue concerning the trust amendment and queries counsel as to how best to proceed: whether to submit on the pleadings, oral argument at separate hearing, or evidentiary hearing. Mr. Szczepanik would not require further briefing or evidence but requests oral argument before the Court. Mr. Franceschini would submit on the briefs.

The Court determines that the matter is fully briefed but will grant the request for oral argument, setting the matter for hearing on January 8, 2021 at 2:00 p.m. in Dept. 204. Any further hearing dates will be set at that time as necessary.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Court Examiner: Sandra Hilton; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
